phases.summary: Argentina defend in a 4-3-3 shape out of possession with Messi on the right of the front three, adopting a patient approach to draw Algeria out. Algeria threaten with a first attack that would have opened the scoring, but Chaibi's goal is ruled out by VAR for a marginal offside; Messi also has a finish ruled offside on a quick counter. Messi then contributes defensively by dispossessing Hadj Moussa as Algeria look to build, while Maza recycles possession to maintain control in a low-tempo phase.

Argentina build through patient defense-to-midfield play with Messi dropping deep to initiate vertical passes. Messi finishes a one-two move between the lines with a left-foot strike past Zidane to give Argentina the lead, while Algeria sit in a deep low block and defend stoutly. The phase features sustained ball movement and a hydration break, with a VAR offside check interrupting the early action.

adjustments: Molina on for Montiel at right back (46)
phases.summary: At half-time Argentina lead 1-0 and replace Montiel with Molina, signaling a right-back tweak. Algeria begin the second half with possession, but Argentina remain compact and Fernandez clears; Messi has a long-range effort that goes wide from the D while La Martinez tests Zidane, earning a save. Argentina then bring Alvarez and Gonzalez on to refresh the attack as the phase develops.

adjustments: Algeria substitutions: Mahrez, Aouar, Amoura on; Hadj Moussa, Gouiri, Boudaoui off (63')
key_matchups: Lionel Messi vs Zidane (Algeria goalkeeper) – Messi’s goal after spill and later save denying a hat-trick
Mahrez vs Maza – sharp interplay leading to Algeria’s first shot
phases.summary: Argentina used a long-ball release to Messi that culminated in a poacher’s finish after Mac Allister’s low drive; Zidane’s spill set Messi up for the 60th-minute goal. Algeria responded with three substitutions, but Argentina maintained a compact narrow defensive shape and pressed to force errors, with Messi continuing to threaten and Lisandro Martínez stepping out of defense to help play out from the back.

adjustments: Substitution: Messi and Romero off; Otamendi and Nico Paz on (78').
phases.summary: Messi's 76th-minute goal punctuates a rapid Argentina break, showing Messi's tempo control and finishing with authority. In the late phases Argentina sit compact with a disciplined back four, inviting Algeria to probe outside the box while subs at 78' refresh experience and maintain shape as the game winds down.
